workers.description: Workday worker profile including employee/contingent worker identity, org assignment, job profile, pay group, management chain, and security-sensitive status.

positions.description: Budgeted Workday position with staffing, org, job, location, and headcount controls.

supervisory_orgs.description: Manager-led Workday supervisory organization hierarchy for routing, staffing, and approvals.

job_profiles.description: Workday job profile and job family metadata.

compensation_records.description: Current worker compensation plan assignments and salary basis.

absence_requests.description: Workday absence and leave requests with balances and approval state.

business_processes.description: Workday business process instances for job, comp, leave, hire, and termination events.

business_process_steps.description: Approval and review steps belonging to a Workday business process.

worker_events.description: Worker-facing event summary for pending changes and audit trails.

security_assignments.description: Workday security group assignment evidence for domain-sensitive simulator behavior.
